block_00: And find out how the week went for other traders
block_03: Hi there! 2020 wasn't an easy year, but you survived it—and you did a great job! No matter what, keep improving, because you can do more, and we are here to help you with that. Take a look at the last week’s events on the IQ Option platform.
block_07: The year is coming to an end, which means it's time to clarify plans for 2021. We've compiled a list of factors you might want to consider when picking assets and planning your trading approach for the foreseeable future.
block_09: Trading Psychology: 5 Tips to Improve Discipline
block_10: The days around Christmas are always the most hectic: the to-do list grows, and emotions are off the scale. Read how to boost your self-discipline and continue trading calmly and rationally in any situation.
block_13: You know that traders have their own proverbs, and they are no less wise than those in voluminous books on the basics of trading. Learn why you should not catch a falling knife and other important thoughts.
block_15: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_41: Isaac Newton invested in the South Sea Company, and in June 1720, when the company's stock soared to £700, he bought shares worth £26,000. In September, the share price crashed below £200. Newton lost about £22,600, which would be $30,483.44 today.
